summary: Iteration 34 - Session Element Visibility & Order Panel Testing COMPLETE. All features verified: Admin panel has the new 'Session Element Visibility & Order' panel with 4 sections (Homepage List, Homepage Detail, Detail Hero, Detail Body). Each section has toggle switches and reorder arrows working correctly. Default values match requirements (Homepage List: session_name=ON, session_type=OFF, duration=OFF). Frontend applies visibility settings correctly - homepage sessions show only session names in left sidebar, right panel shows all toggled elements. Added missing Save button for visibility settings.
critical_code_review_comments: SessionVisibilityPanel.jsx: Well-structured component with 4 sections and proper default configs
SessionsSection.jsx: Correctly implements getVisible() and getOrder() helpers for visibility control
SessionDetailPage.jsx: Properly renders hero and body elements based on visibility config
AdminPanel.jsx: Fixed - Added 'Save Visibility Settings' button after SessionVisibilityPanel (was missing)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Session visibility panel fully working. Config stored at settings.page_heroes.session_template.visibility with 4 keys: homepage_list, homepage_detail, detail_hero, detail_body. Each is array of {key, label, visible, order}. Save button now exists for visibility settings in Sessions tab.
